summary.text: Fundamental and historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP.

overview.description: Microsoft Corporation develops and supports software, services, devices, and solutions worldwide. The Productivity and Business Processes segment offers Microsoft 365 commercial, enterprise mobility + security, windows commercial, power BI, exchange, sharepoint, Microsoft teams, security and compliance, and copilot; Microsoft 365 commercial products, such as Windows commercial on-premises and office licensed services; Microsoft 365 consumer products and cloud services, including Microsoft 365 consumer subscriptions, office licensed on-premises,...
overview.financialIntro: In fiscal year 2025, Microsoft's revenue was $281.72 billion, an increase of 14.93% compared to the previous year's $245.12 billion. Earnings were $101.83 billion, an increase of 15.54%.
overview.analystIntro: According to 58 analysts, the average rating for MSFT stock is "Strong Buy." The 12-month stock price target is $556.75, which is an increase of 45.91% from the latest price.
